pi_items.source: Web search for Celestrak's GNSS TLE URL confirmed https://celestrak.org/NORAD/elements/gnss.txt is valid.
Cross-referenced NORAD IDs with NAVSTAR and GALILEO satellites via satellite tracking databases online.
Verified coordinates 39.9936 N point directly to the NIST laboratory campus in Boulder, CO.
Verified coordinates 105.2618 W point directly to the NIST laboratory campus in Boulder, CO.
Verified the approximate elevation of the NIST Boulder campus is 1655 meters (5430 ft).
Verified via satellite catalogs that NORAD ID 55268 corresponds to NAVSTAR 82, 48859 to NAVSTAR 81, 43058 to GALILEO 22, and 43565 to GALILEO 26.

privileged_info_summary: I verified via satellite tracking catalogs and web searches that the requested NORAD IDs correctly correspond to the real-world navigation satellites NAVSTAR 82 (55268), NAVSTAR 81 (48859), GALILEO 22 (43058), and GALILEO 26 (43565). I also confirmed that Celestrak's gnss.txt is the correct source for GNSS TLEs and that the coordinates 39.9936 N, -105.2618 W, and altitude 1655 m accurately represent the NIST time laboratory in Boulder, Colorado. The data for this configuration task is not synthetic.
